title: Hope Moor Wind Farm: section 35 direction, Planning Act 2008
body: "Direction by the Secretary of State on the Hope Moor Wind Farm.  Date of decision  21 August 2025  Company / location   Fred. Olsen Renewables LtdLondonEngland   Type of project  Onshore wind farm / Section 35 direction, Planning Act 2008  Maximum output  100 MW (approximately)  "
